---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- Describe the problem you are trying to solve.
     Focus on the problem, not the solution. What are you unable to do today?
     What failure mode does this leave you exposed to? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the solution you have in mind. Be specific about what would change
     for the operator (new env vars, new annotations, new Helm values, new CRD fields). -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out? -->

## Context

<!-- How are you using mechanic today?
     Which providers, which agentType, cluster size, namespace count, etc.
     This helps prioritise features that affect the most common deployments. -->

## Would you be willing to contribute this?

- [ ] Yes, I can open a PR
- [ ] Yes, but I would need guidance
- [ ] No, I am requesting it for someone else to implement
